basic_details.job_title: ESIC Teaching Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 48 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Employees' State Insurance Corporation Medical College & Hospital Faridabad (ESIC) has released the official Teaching Faculty Notification 2026 on 18-05-2026 at ESIC Official Website. A total of 48 vacancies have been announced under the ESIC Teaching Faculty Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates with qualifications as per the latest NMC (National Medical Commission) guidelines and aged up to 69 years can attend the walk-in interview on 29-05-2026. The official notification PDF and walk-in interview details are available below.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 69 years for all posts.

qualification.education_qualification: As per latest NMC (National Medical Commission) guidelines
qualification.details: Professor: As per latest NMC (National Medical Commission) guidelines Associate Professor: As per latest NMC (National Medical Commission) guidelines Assistant Professor: As per latest NMC (National Medical Commission) guidelines

salary_details.details: Professor: Consolidated pay ₹2,60,226/- per month Associate Professor: Consolidated pay ₹1,73,045/- per month Assistant Professor: Consolidated pay ₹1,48,669/- per month

selection_process: Academic credentials and interview performance Document Verification

faq.question: Q1. What is the total number of vacancies for Teaching Faculty posts at ESIC Medical College & Hospital Faridabad?
faq.answer: There are a total of 48 vacancies for Teaching Faculty posts announced by ESIC Medical College & Hospital Faridabad for the year 2026. This includes positions for Professor, Associate Professor, and Assistant Professor.

faq.question: Q2. What is the application mode for this ESIC recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this ESIC recruitment is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview directly at the specified venue and time without any prior online application process.

faq.question: Q3. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Teaching Faculty posts at ESIC Medical College & Hospital Faridabad is scheduled for 29th May 2026. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for the Teaching Faculty positions?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all Teaching Faculty posts at ESIC Medical College & Hospital Faridabad is 69 years. There is no mention of age relaxation for any category in the provided data.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Teaching Faculty posts?
faq.answer: The salary offered varies by post: Professor receives ₹2,60,226/- per month, Associate Professor receives ₹1,73,045/- per month, and Assistant Professor receives ₹1,48,669/- per month. These are consolidated pay scales.

faq.question: Q6. What are the minimum qualifications required for the Teaching Faculty posts?
faq.answer: The qualifications for the Teaching Faculty posts are as per the latest NMC (National Medical Commission) guidelines, specifically referencing the NMC Notification (30/06/2025) on Medical Institutions (Qualification of Faculty) Regulations 2025.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for SC/ST or Women candidates?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for SC/ST and Women candidates for this recruitment. However, General/OBC candidates need to pay an application fee of ₹500.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if applicable), and category certificates (if applicable), along with one set of self-attested photocopies.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for these ESIC posts?
faq.answer: The selection process involves an evaluation of academic credentials and interview performance, followed by document verification. Candidates are assessed based on their qualifications and performance during the interview.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the ESIC Medical College & Hospital located?
faq.answer: ESIC Medical College & Hospital is located in Faridabad, Haryana. The walk-in interview will be conducted at this location on the specified date.
